lines.speaker: Jelly
lines.text: When Jelly was just a baby troll, parents left him in Slayer cave... But Jelly is strong, Jelly learn to survive in the cave, and one day Jelly will become great Slayer master!

lines.speaker: Jelly
lines.text: When the Kurasks finded new treasures, many humans come to the Slayer cave to hunt them... No Kurasks left for Jelly to train on, so Jelly makes a private area just for training. These be Jelly's very own Kurask!

lines.speaker: Jelly
lines.text: Not just any human gets to train up here, you has to be on a Kurask Slayer task.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of a name is Jelly?

lines.speaker: Jelly
lines.text: Jelly grew up in this cave, there not much choice around for a hungry troll...

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: Jelly
lines.text: Naughty human! You not hunting the Kurask! Jelly's Kurasks only for people on Slayer tasks.
